title.purpose: Profile names and top-level tool identity.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Switches and disclosure state changes only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Adds a profile, matcher, or header row.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(0.62 0.16 68); color: white; font: 600 12px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.54 0.16 68); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.15 68 / .3); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Technical Input
components.description: Compact field for header names, values, hosts, and regex.
components.css: .ds-tech-input { border: 1px solid oklch(0.87 0.008 68); border-radius: 6px; padding: 7px 9px; color: oklch(0.22 0.012 68); background: white; font: 12px ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-tech-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.62 0.16 68); outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.15 68 / .28); }

narrative.overview: A compact, local-first developer tool whose state is always visible and whose controls stay familiar.

rules.name: The Sparse Accent Rule
rules.body: Amber occupies no more than ten percent of the visible surface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Static surfaces use dividers and tonal layers, not shadows.

dos: Do keep controls keyboard accessible and visibly focused.
Do show whether each profile and rule is active.
donts: Don't use SaaS dashboard cards, glassmorphism, or purple gradients.
Don't nest interactive controls or encode state with color alone.
